channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Ex-Spain soccer boss Rubiales guilty of sexual assault and fined for World Cup kiss
item.description: MADRID (AP) — Former Spanish soccer boss Luis Rubiales was found guilty of sexually assaulting player Jenni Hermoso on Thursday for kissing her after the 2023 Women’s World Cup final.
item.dc:creator: TALES AZZONI, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Rookie QB card could be worth $50K if you pull it from new Topps set
item.description: Denver Broncos rookie quarterback Bo Nix impressed on the field, and now a Colorado sports card store is ready to pay $50,000 to keep a unique card featuring him close to home.
item.dc:creator: Spencer Kristensen, NewsNation

item.title: While Manfred frets, some opposing players cheer the big-spending push of the Los Angeles Dodgers
item.description: GLENDALE, Ariz. (AP) — Baseball Commissioner Rob Manfred shared conflicting feelings about the big-spending Los Angeles Dodgers this week, praising the franchise's competitive spirit in one breath before worrying about the financial disparity they've created in the next.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: USA-Canada rivalry takes center stage in 4 Nations Face-Off final: What to know
item.description: USA and Canada to battle for the 4 Nations Face-Off championship on Thursday night. Here's what you need to know about the heated rivalry.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Sponsor invite Akie Iwai leads the LPGA Thailand golf tournament by 3 strokes after 10-under 62
item.description: PATTAYA, Thailand (AP) — Akie Iwai made the best of a sponsor's invite to shoot a 10-under 62 and lead by three strokes after the first round of the LPGA's Thailand tournament at Siam Country Club's Pattaya Old Course.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Missouri coach Dennis Gates takes PA microphone to head off court-storming celebration
item.description: COLUMBIA, Mo. (AP) — After Missouri basketball fans stormed the court following a victory over then-No. 1 Kansas on Dec. 8, Tigers coach Dennis Gates made sure there wouldn't be an encore after No. 15 Missouri beat No. 4 Alabama 110-98 on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: DAVID SOLOMON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Hornets stun Lakers 100-97 after Luka struggles and LeBron misses 2 late shots to tie it
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Miles Bridges scored 29 points, LaMelo Ball added 27 and the Charlotte Hornets stunned LeBron James and Luka Doncic with a 100-97 victory over the Los Angeles Lakers on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No. 1 Auburn overcomes a rough offensive performance to beat Arkansas 67-60
item.description: AUBURN, Ala. (AP) — Johni Broome had 16 points and 13 rebounds and No. 1 Auburn overcame a rough offensive performance to beat Arkansas 67-60 on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Penn State bucks skid, tops Nebraska 89-72
item.description: UNIVERSITY PARK, Pa. (AP) — Yanic Konan Niederhauser and Zach Hicks each scored 19 points, D’Marco Dunn added 17 and Penn State routed Nebraska 89-72 on Wednesday night to end a seven-game losing streak. Penn State (14-13, 4-12 Big Ten) won its first game since topping Rutgers 80-72 on Jan. 20.
item.dc:creator: PHL 17

item.title: Why Steve Kerr likes Draymond Green’s championship prediction
item.description: Steve Kerr said he also believes the Warriors can win the championship after Draymond Green's bold prediction.
item.dc:creator: Danny Emerman, The Mercury News

item.title: Lions' Jameson Williams won't be disciplined by NFL after facing arrest in gun-related incident: report
item.description: Detroit Lions wide receiver Jameson Williams will not face discipline by the NFL regarding an October 2024 incident in which he faced arrest on a gun charge.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: This rookie QB card could be worth $50K if you pull it from a new Topps set
item.description: Denver Broncos rookie quarterback Bo Nix impressed on the field, and now a Colorado sports card store is ready to pay $50,000 to keep a unique card featuring him close to home.
item.dc:creator: Spencer Kristensen, Fox 5

item.title: Former SEAL shared advice with Ohio State football team during Buckeyes' national title run, Ryan Day says
item.description: At the request of Ryan Day, a former Navy SEAL, who also has played in the NFL, gave the Ohio State football team some leadership tips during their College Football Playoff run.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Mbappé hat trick for Real Madrid dumps Man City out of Champions League. PSG and Dortmund advance
item.description: Kylian Mbappé scored a hat trick, Erling Haaland stayed on the bench injured and Real Madrid dumped Manchester City out of the Champions League on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: GRAHAM DUNBAR, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: International rugby match set to return to Chicago
item.description: Chicago has been chosen as the host city for the international rugby match between the All Blacks of New Zealand and Ireland, set to take place at Soldier Field on November 1.
item.dc:creator: Christine Flores, WGN 9

item.title: WATCH: 1st-year White Sox manager Will Venable goes 1-on-1 with GN Sports from spring training
item.description: PHOENIX — As first-year White Sox manager Will Venable begins to introduce himself to Chicago baseball fans, you can probably already state this about him with certainty: He'd beat any other MLB manager on the basketball court.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Angels star Mike Trout moving from center to right field in hopes of staying more healthy
item.description: TEMPE, Ariz. (AP) — Los Angeles Angels oft-injured star Mike Trout is moving from center to right field in hopes of better preserving his health. The three-time AL MVP played in 82 or fewer games in three of the past four seasons while dealing with an assortment of injuries.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: College student Jaren Barajas beats Damian Lillard in 3-point shooting contest, wins $100K
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Jaren Barajas shoots on his backyard hoop maybe once a month these days. He's a busy 18-year-old college student now, so basketball has taken a backburner to academics.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Michigan State coach Tom Izzo passes Bob Knight for most Big Ten conference wins
item.description: CHAMPAIGN, Ill. (AP) — Michigan State’s Tom Izzo followed one of the most disappointing losses of his coaching career with a record-setting victory. For Illinois, it was a game in which nothing went right after halftime — or during it, thanks to an unfortunate jersey-raising snafu. The No.
item.dc:creator: STEVE STEIN, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: BYU rolls past Kansas State, 80-65
item.description: PROVO, Utah (AP) - Richie Saunders scored 17 points and grabbed 14 rebounds on Saturday night to help BYU beat Kansas State 80-65 and snap the Wildcats' six-game win streak. Dallin Hall scored 16 points and Fousseyni Traore 11 for BYU (17-8, 8-6 Big 12).
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Boys Basketball: Chula Vista 58, Sweetwater 56
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Boys basketball Chula Vista at Sweetwater with the Spartans edging out the Red Devils 58-56. Both teams now 4-1 in league play with the season winding down and league title still up for grabs.
item.dc:creator: Fox 5

item.title: Avid volunteer enjoys first Genesis Invitational
item.description: Jenny Liu has volunteered at Torrey Pines for 24 years. She’s seen a lot in her time, but this week it was her first experience with the Genesis Invitational.
item.dc:creator: Frank Jefferson, Fox 5

item.title: NASCAR driver Ryan Blaney previews Daytona 500
item.description: Ryan Blaney, 2023 NASCAR Cup Series champion, joined NewsNation to talk Sunday's Daytona 500, which marks the 67th running of the event.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Philadelphia Eagles Super Bowl parade
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — On this Feb. 14, love Hurts. At least in Philadelphia, where swooning Eagles fans are ready to celebrate the Super Bowl champions and MVP quarterback Jalen Hurts across the City of Brotherly Love.
item.dc:creator: MARYCLAIRE DALE, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: JuJu Watkins, No. 6 USC hand No. 1 UCLA its first loss of the season
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — JuJu Watkins broke out of a scoring slump with 38 points, helping sixth-ranked Southern California topple No. 1 UCLA 71-60 and further delivering on her goal of restoring the program to its earlier glory.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Utah Warriors kick off 2025 season next week
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - About to begin its eighth season in Major League Rugby, the Utah Warriors are out to improve upon last year's 5-11 record. "I think we do really well this year," said fullback Sione Mahe.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Early look: The views and venues of the 2026 Winter Olympics
item.description: As the countdown to the 2026 Winter Games continues, preparations are in full swing in Milan and Cortina.
item.dc:creator: Alyssa Orange, NewsNation

item.title: White Sox sign veteran CF Michael A. Taylor to 1-year deal
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Center fielder Michael A. Taylor and the Chicago White Sox have agreed to a $1.95 million, one-year contract. Chicago announced the agreement Wednesday. Taylor spent last season with the Pittsburgh Pirates, batting .193 with five home runs, 21 RBI and a .543 OPS in 113 games.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Countdown to the 2025 Daytona 500: Drivers get ready for season opener
item.description: The biggest race in NASCAR is only a few days away, where 40 drivers will compete to win “The Great American Race.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Suter, WGN 9
